If your question is about positioning modes, TOML semantics, or `mrtk`
CLI behavior, the MRTKLIB repository or its documentation is usually
a better starting point:
- https://github.com/h-shiono/MRTKLIB
- https://h-shiono.github.io/MRTKLIB/

Use this template if you believe the answer may lead to a documentation
or code change in the web UI.
-->
